francophone.title: Au procès libyen en appel de Nicolas Sarkozy, le parquet général dénonce une «association de malfaiteurs» d’un «niveau opérationnel inégalé»
francophone.excerpt: L’heure du réquisitoire a sonné au procès du financement libyen présumé de la campagne de 2007 de l’ancien chef de l’Etat. Ce lundi 11 mai, l’accusation a demandé sa condamnation.

francophone.excerpt: Il visait un «musée parisien ainsi que des membres de la communauté juive» selon une source proche du dossier. Selon le quotidien «le Monde», la cible du terroriste était le Louvre à Paris.

francophone.excerpt: Ancien chercheur au CNRS, Franck Zal est depuis quelques années à la tête de l'entreprise Hemarina, basée à Morlaix, dans le Finistère.

francophone.title: En Bretagne, les saisonniers refusent de se faire marcher sur les pieds : « On dit que les jeunes ne veulent plus travailler, mais c’est surtout parce qu’on est mal payés »
francophone.excerpt: Rémunération, jours de repos, logement, ambiance au sein de l’équipe… dans les secteurs touristiques de la région, les travailleurs saisonniers exigent désormais de meilleures conditions de travail.

anglophone.title: France seeks to move beyond colonial ties by meeting African leaders in Kenya
anglophone.excerpt: In a first since these meetings started in the 1970s, this move reflects a change in France's thinking.

anglophone.title: Israeli lawmakers set up tribunal, allow for death penalty for October 2023 attackers
anglophone.excerpt: The measure passed 93-0 in the 120-seat Knesset, or parliament, reflecting widespread support for punishing those found responsible for what was the deadliest attack in Israel's history.

anglophone.title: Craig Morton, former quarterback for Cowboys and Broncos, dies at 83
anglophone.excerpt: Craig Morton, who spent 18 years in the NFL and became the first quarterback to start the Super Bowl for two franchises — the Dallas Cowboys and Denver Broncos — has died. He was 83.

anglophone.title: EU diplomats agree to sanction Hamas leaders and Israeli settlers

anglophone.title: Israel passes law to allow death penalty and public trials for those linked to 7 October
anglophone.excerpt: Israel passes a law that permits the death penalty and public trials for those involved in the unprecedented Hamas-led attacks.

anglophone.title: Trump taps former FEMA director to lead the disaster agency again
anglophone.excerpt: Cameron Hamilton led FEMA briefly in 2025. He was removed by the Trump administration after telling Congress that the agency should continue to exist. Now, he's been nominated to lead it once again.

anglophone.title: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support'

anglophone.title: US in closely guarded talks to open new bases in Greenland

anglophone.title: Why cruise ship passengers with possible hantavirus exposure went to Nebraska

anglophone.title: South African president says he will not step down after impeachment call

anglophone.title: New poll finds a majority of Americans unsure if attempts on Trump's life were real
